title: ClearSight - Sodium compatible!
description: Boosts brightness, transparent particles, no pumpkin blur, better spyglass, lower utilities, smaller snow x rain, less particles, lower fire, etc.
body:
## What this does
This pack is designed to add better visibility for both regular uses and pvp. This is usable with sodium, and can be used with verions under 1.21.2 if you want to forgo the boosted brightness aspect.

## Features
- Better Nausea
- Better Vigenette
- Clearer pumpkin blur
- Clearer underwater
- Fullbright (works with Sodium)
- Lower fire
- Lower utilities (shield, items)
- Outlined powdered snow
- Smaller totem pop
- Transparent particles (block, potion)
- Visible phantoms
- Visible tripwire
- Visible trapped chests

## Note
Regular fire (on blocks) is normal height. Only player dire is lowered

If you encounter issues, or have questions, email me at enderVue@outlook.com
